data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for subject-based extensibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for subject-based extensibility for plugin/domain-specific targets. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm or deny this requirement's satisfaction. The linked use case mentions the need for subject-based extensibility, yet there are no corresponding checks or confirmations provided to validate this aspect, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of subject-based extensibility for plugin/domain-specific targets being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
